0_Overview: What is Data Engineering: Building Pipelines to Move and Transform Data
Data Engineer vs Data Scientist vs Data Analyst vs ML Engineer
The Modern Data Stack: Ingestion → Storage → Transformation → Serving
Batch Processing vs Stream Processing: When to Use Each
ETL vs ELT: Extract-Transform-Load vs Extract-Load-Transform
Data Warehouse: Structured, Optimized for Analytics (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift)
Data Lake: Raw Data at Scale (S3, HDFS, Azure Data Lake)
Data Lakehouse: Best of Both Worlds (Delta Lake, Apache Iceberg)
OLTP vs OLAP: Transactional vs Analytical Workloads
Apache Kafka: The Backbone of Real-time Data Pipelines
Apache Spark: Distributed Data Processing at Scale
Apache Airflow: Workflow Orchestration for Data Pipelines
dbt: SQL-based Data Transformation in the Warehouse
Data Quality: Validation, Monitoring, and Alerting
Data Governance: Ownership, Lineage, Cataloging
Schema Evolution: Handling Changing Data Structures
Partitioning and Clustering for Query Performance
Data Serialization Formats: JSON, Avro, Parquet, ORC
Change Data Capture (CDC): Syncing Databases in Real-time
Key Skills: SQL, Python, Spark, Kafka, Cloud Data Services

0_Overview: Mobile Development Landscape: Native, Cross-platform, Hybrid, PWA
Native iOS: Swift + SwiftUI/UIKit — Best Performance, Apple Ecosystem
Native Android: Kotlin + Jetpack Compose/XML — Best Performance, Google Ecosystem
Cross-platform: React Native (JavaScript), Flutter (Dart), Xamarin (.NET)
React Native: Write Once, Run on iOS and Android with JavaScript/TypeScript
Flutter: Write Once, Run Everywhere with Dart — Pixel-perfect UI
Hybrid Apps: Capacitor/Ionic — Web Tech Wrapped in Native Shell
PWA: Progressive Web Apps — Web Apps with Native-like Features
When to Go Native: Performance-critical, Platform-specific Features
When to Go Cross-platform: Faster Development, Shared Codebase, Smaller Team
Mobile App Architecture: MVC, MVP, MVVM, Clean Architecture
State Management on Mobile: Redux, Zustand (RN), BLoC, Provider (Flutter)
Navigation: React Navigation (RN), Navigator (Flutter)
Local Storage: AsyncStorage, MMKV, SQLite, Realm
Push Notifications: FCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging), APNs
App Store Deployment: Apple App Store, Google Play Store
Over-the-Air Updates: Expo EAS Update, CodePush
Mobile Performance: JS Thread vs UI Thread, Hermes Engine, Reanimated
Deep Linking and Universal Links
Mobile Security: Certificate Pinning, Biometrics, Secure Storage
1_Cross_Platform: React Native vs Flutter vs Xamarin vs Ionic
Flutter: Widgets, State Management, Dart Language
Capacitor: Web Apps as Native Apps
Progressive Web Apps (PWA): Service Workers, Web App Manifest
PWA: Offline Support, Push Notifications, Install Prompt
2_Mobile_Architecture: App Store Guidelines and Review Process
